S.FORM: Norton Barnhill 7 bulad 15 demiad, 1953 a mihca, Norton Barnhill, miunduay.
S.PHON: norton barnħir~ɾr~ɾ * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, norton barnħir~ɾr~ɾ, miunduaj.
